news.title: Tigrinya catechism reprint reaches 65 congregations
news.excerpt: After the conflict years, replacement copies of Luther's Small Catechism in Tigrinya have arrived in Mekelle and surrounding parishes.
news.body:
Five thousand copies of Luther's Small Catechism in Tigrinya have arrived in Mekelle, marking the completion of a two-year reprint effort that began after the regional conflict ended in late 2022.

The first 1,800 copies were hand-distributed last week by Pastor Tadesse Bekele and a team of five seminary students to 65 congregations across Tigray, Amhara, and the highlands of Wollo. Each parish received a starter set of 20 copies — enough to seat every elder and Sunday-school teacher with their own catechism.

"For two years I had been preaching from notes in the margin of my one borrowed catechism," Pastor Tadesse said. "To put a copy in the hands of every elder in our parish is to put the Word of God back in the language they pray in."

The remaining copies will ship in three monthly waves through August, with the final shipment dedicated to the Sunday schools of St. Mark Lutheran Mekelle. Donors who underwrote the reprint will receive a parish-by-parish distribution log.

news.title: Children's Bible Stories enters its third printing in Afaan Oromoo
news.excerpt: Demand from Sunday schools across Oromia keeps growing — the third printing of 5,000 copies is now on press in Addis Ababa.
news.body:
A Child's Garden of Bible Stories in Afaan Oromoo enters its third printing this month, with 5,000 fresh copies on press at Addis Lutheran Press. Combined with the first two printings, more than 16,000 copies will have shipped to congregations across Oromia by year-end.

The demand has come almost entirely from Sunday schools. "The first printing was meant to last two years," said Abdi Lemma, the lead translator. "We were out of stock in eleven months." Bale Lutheran Parish alone has requested 320 copies for its catechism camp this summer.

The new printing includes minor editorial corrections suggested by teachers in the field — six idiomatic phrasings adjusted for the Bale dialect, and a glossary added at the back for the Wollega congregations. The interior illustrations remain unchanged.

Distribution begins May 18 from the Adama warehouse.

news.title: Sidaama translation team begins work on the Small Catechism
news.excerpt: A new translation effort opens a sixth heart language for LHF Ethiopia. Three reviewers met in Hawassa to set the editorial standard.
news.body:
Three reviewers convened at Hawassa Lutheran College last week to begin the first-ever translation of Luther's Small Catechism into Sidaamu Afoo, opening a sixth heart language for LHF Ethiopia's confessional library.

The team is led by Deaconess Almaz Wolde, with theological oversight from Pastor Markos Daniel of the LCMS partnership program. A first draft of the Ten Commandments and the Apostles' Creed is expected by September, with a finished manuscript targeted for early 2027.

"For the first time in my lifetime, I am holding a Lutheran book in Sidaamu Afoo," Deaconess Almaz said of the 1996 hymnal that started this work. "This catechism will be the second. It will not be the last."

The project is partially funded; the first-edition print run is currently $4,200 toward an $11,500 goal. Donors can adopt the project on the LHF Ethiopia projects page.

news.title: LHF Ethiopia opens a distribution warehouse in Addis Ababa
news.excerpt: A dedicated office and warehouse in Bole simplifies customs clearance and inland shipping to congregations countrywide.
news.body:
LHF Ethiopia opened its first dedicated distribution warehouse this month — a 220 m² facility in Bole sub-city that consolidates inbound shipping, customs clearance, and parish-by-parish dispatch under one roof.

Before the warehouse opened, every container of Lutheran books shipped from the US or Europe had to be cleared through a series of third-party brokers, then transferred to congregations through a patchwork of regional drop points. Average customs-to-parish time was 47 days.

The Bole facility cuts that to 14 days for Addis-area parishes and around 22 days for outlying regions. Quarterly distribution events — the first of which is scheduled for July 12 — will now happen on site, with pastors and parish administrators collecting their parish shipments directly.

The warehouse was funded through a one-time donation from a Lutheran congregation in St. Louis and a small grant from the LHF parent organization in Macomb.

values.title: Sola Scriptura — Scripture Alone
values.body: The Bible is the only rule and norm of faith and life. Holy Scripture is the written Word of God — inspired, inerrant, and the sole authority by which every doctrine is tested. We teach what Scripture teaches and confess what Scripture confesses.

values.title: Sola Gratia — Grace Alone
values.body: Salvation is the free gift of God's grace. We are saved not by what we have done or could do, but by the unmerited favor of God in Christ Jesus, who came to seek and save the lost.

values.title: Sola Fide — Faith Alone
values.body: We are justified — declared righteous before God — through faith alone in Jesus Christ, apart from works of the law. This good news is the central article of the Christian faith and the heart of every book LHF Ethiopia distributes.

values.title: Solus Christus — Christ Alone
values.body: Jesus Christ, true God and true man, is the one mediator between God and humanity. There is no other name under heaven by which we must be saved. His life, death, and resurrection accomplish our salvation in full.

values.title: Soli Deo Gloria — Glory to God Alone
values.body: Every congregation served, every book printed, every podcast recorded is offered to the glory of God alone. We labour in His name, by His grace, for the spread of His Word in Ethiopia.

values.title: Word and Sacrament
values.body: Christ comes to us through the means of grace: the preached Word of the Gospel, Holy Baptism, and the Lord's Supper. We support congregations in the regular, faithful use of these means so the saving work of Christ is delivered into the lives of God's people.

values.title: The Book of Concord
values.body: We confess the unaltered Augsburg Confession (1530), Luther's Small and Large Catechisms, and the other Lutheran Confessions gathered in the Book of Concord — because they are a faithful exposition of Holy Scripture. Confessional Lutheran teaching shapes every title we choose to translate.

values.title: Heart language, free of charge
values.body: People meet Christ best in the language they think and pray in. LHF Ethiopia translates, prints, and freely distributes Lutheran books in Amharic, Afaan Oromoo, Tigrinya, Somali, Sidaamu Afoo, and beyond — never sold, always given.

stories.name: Pastor Tadesse Bekele
stories.quote: When the reprints arrived, I cried. For two years I had been preaching from notes in the margin of my one borrowed catechism. Now every elder in our parish has their own.

stories.name: Selam Girma
stories.quote: The children's Bible stories in Amharic changed our Sunday school. The kids read aloud to their parents at home — sometimes the parents are the ones who learn.

stories.name: Abdi Lemma
stories.quote: Translating Luther into Afaan Oromoo is not just word-for-word. We choose words a farmer in Bale would actually say, so the catechism lives in the language of the kitchen, not the lecture hall.

stories.name: Almaz Wolde
stories.quote: For the first time in my lifetime, I am holding a Lutheran book in Sidaamu Afoo. It is one small first edition — and it is everything.

stories.name: Yohannes Asfaw
stories.quote: Most jobs through our press are textbooks or government forms. LHF Ethiopia is different — when those books leave the dock, they leave for free, and the press knows it.

podcastEpisodes.title: Salvation by Faith — መዳን በእምነት
podcastEpisodes.summary: Salvation by faith alone, or by faith plus works? A scripture-grounded walk-through of the Lutheran answer in Amharic and English.

podcastEpisodes.title: Original Sin — የውርስ ሃጥያት
podcastEpisodes.summary: What does scripture teach about original sin, and how does it shape the way we read the Gospel? Episode 128, in Amharic with English exposition.

podcastEpisodes.title: 1 Timothy 1:1 — Our Hope, Jesus Christ
podcastEpisodes.summary: Verse-by-verse study of 1 Timothy 1:1 — ተስፋችን እየሱስ ክርስቶስ. Why Paul opens with hope, and what it means for the Ethiopian church today.

podcastEpisodes.title: Luther's Small Catechism — የሉተር ትንሹ ካቴኪዝም
podcastEpisodes.summary: Why the Small Catechism still matters 500 years on — a walk-through of its structure and how it shapes parish life in Ethiopia.
